description: A big impactful number lands, with small sprite cutouts falling/scattering (dramatic emphasis of a large or shocking figure).
whenToUse: A shocking headline number that deserves a dramatic hit (e.g. a huge multiplier, a death toll).
generalize: The number, the falling sprite, and the field are SLOTS.
produces: the number = gpt-image-2 lettering (title-bold, red); falling sprites = gpt-image-2 cutout -> rembg; ImpactNumber drops them.
styleLock: Number = gpt-image-2 lettering (title-bold, usually red); sprites = gpt-image-2 cutouts.
